commit.message:
Fix unbound TEMP_DIR variable on EXIT trap

TEMP_DIR was declared as `local` inside main(), but the EXIT trap
runs after main() returns, when local variables are out of scope.
With `set -u` (nounset), this causes "unbound variable" error.

Move TEMP_DIR declaration to global scope so the trap can access it.

Add YouTube demo link to README, remove duplicate content

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add YouTube demo video to README

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Removed the reference to the December 2025 Core Update in the description.

commit.message:
style: remove center-aligned HTML from README Replace

blocks with standard markdown syntax for images, badges, and text. Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6

feat: add header image and demo GIFs to README

Add branded header image, /blog write demo GIF, and commands demo GIF.
Update README with centered header, badge row, demo section, and
assets directory in architecture tree.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: upgrade readability layer with research-backed thresholds (v1.2.0)

Comprehensive readability upgrade driven by 340-line research document
(120+ sources). Shifts scoring thresholds to align with Yoast, GEO,
WCAG, and Raptive data while preserving 5-category/100-point architecture.

Key changes:
- Flesch target: 45-60 → 60-70 (fixes prior inconsistency)
- Paragraph hard limit: 100 → 150 words (200 = Yoast red)
- Ideal paragraph range: 40-55 → 40-80 words
- H2 heading frequency: 150-200 → 200-300 words
- Content Quality redistribution: Depth 8→7, Readability 6→7

New automated checks in analyze_blog.py:
- Passive voice estimation (regex heuristic, target ≤10%)
- Transition word percentage (target 20-30%)
- AI trigger word detection (26 words, target ≤5/1K)
- Sentence length distribution (>20 words ≤25%)
- Backward-compatible output aliases preserved

New reference sections:
- google-landscape-2026.md: Readability & Engagement Signals
- geo-optimization.md: Readability-GEO Connection

16 files updated across references, script, skills, agents, and docs.
Mobile score (≤100 words) intentionally preserved as stricter threshold.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

chore: remove placeholder screenshots directory

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: built-in SVG charts, image verification, readability checks (v1.1.0)

- Add blog-chart sub-skill: 7 chart types, dark-mode, accessible, JSX-aware
- Eliminate external /svg dependency — claude-blog is now fully self-contained
- Researcher agent verifies image URLs resolve (HTTP 200) before embedding
- Writer agent runs post-draft readability self-check
- Image density guidelines by content type added to visual-media.md
- Install/uninstall scripts updated for 13 sub-skills

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: add uninstall.ps1 to README architecture tree and uninstall section

- Add context: fork to all 4 agent frontmatter blocks
- Move lxml/jsonschema from core to optional deps in requirements.txt
- Add --version flag to analyze_blog.py (reports 1.0.0)
- Create uninstall.ps1 (Windows PowerShell uninstaller)

- Fix broken template reference (how-to.md → how-to-guide.md)
- Standardize GitHub URLs to AgriciDaniel (correct case)
- Add firebase-debug.log and blueprint to .gitignore

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Phase 8: Final polish — orchestrator and README

Expand main orchestrator to 12 commands, 12 sub-skills, 4 agents,
12 references, 12 templates, 5-category scoring. Rewrite README
with one-command install, complete architecture tree, feature
highlights, documentation links, and badges.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Phase 7: Update existing 6 sub-skills with research findings

Enhance blog-write (TL;DR box, template selection, info gain markers,
citation capsules, burstiness check), blog-rewrite (AI content detection,
anti-AI patterns, cannibalization check), blog-analyze (5-category
100-point scoring, E-E-A-T, AI citation readiness, export formats),
blog-brief (template recommendation, distribution plan, link architecture),
blog-calendar (content decay detection, 60/30/10 mix, cluster tracking),
blog-strategy (hub-and-spoke clusters, AI citation surface, GEO strategy).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Phase 6: Upgrade Python analysis script (5-category scoring)

Rewrite analyze_blog.py from 440 to ~1600 lines with new 5-category
100-point scoring system (Content 30, SEO 25, E-E-A-T 15, Technical 15,
AI Citation 15). Add readability analysis, AI content detection,
schema validation, link analysis, and new CLI options
(--format, --category, --fix, --batch --sort).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Phase 5: Expand subagent architecture (4 agents)

New agents:
- blog-seo.md: SEO validation specialist (9-point pass/fail checklist)
- blog-reviewer.md: Quality assessment (5-category 100-point scoring, AI detection)

Updated agents:
- blog-researcher.md: Add cover image search, image density calc,
  competitor gap analysis, source tier verification
- blog-writer.md: Add TL;DR generation, info gain markers, citation
  capsules, internal linking zones, anti-AI-detection patterns

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Phase 4: Add 12 content type templates

Templates for structured blog post creation:
- how-to-guide: Step-by-step tutorials (2,000-2,500 words)
- listicle: Ranked/numbered lists (1,500-2,000 words)
- case-study: Results-focused narratives (1,500-2,000 words)
- comparison: X vs Y feature matrix analysis (1,500-2,000 words)
- pillar-page: Comprehensive authority guides (3,000-4,000 words)
- product-review: First-hand product assessments (1,500-2,000 words)
- thought-leadership: Contrarian opinion/analysis (1,500-2,500 words)
- roundup: Expert quotes + curated resources (1,500-2,000 words)
- tutorial: Code/tool walkthroughs (2,000-3,000 words)
- news-analysis: Timely event analysis (800-1,200 words)
- data-research: Original data studies (2,000-3,000 words)
- faq-knowledge: FAQ/knowledge base pages (1,500-2,000 words)

Each template includes answer-first prompts, visual/chart markers,
information gain prompts, FAQ sections, and internal linking zones.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Phase 3: Expand reference docs (7 new, 5 updated)

New reference documents:
- eeat-signals.md: Author E-E-A-T requirements, Person schema, experience markers
- ai-crawler-guide.md: robots.txt for AI crawlers, Cloudflare config, SSR requirements
- schema-stack.md: Complete blog schema reference with JSON-LD examples
- platform-guides.md: 9 platforms (Next.js, Astro, Hugo, Jekyll, WordPress, Ghost, 11ty, Gatsby, static)
- distribution-playbook.md: Reddit, YouTube, LinkedIn, Twitter, email, review platforms
- internal-linking.md: Link architecture, hub-and-spoke model, orphan detection
- content-templates.md: Index and guide for 12 content type templates

Updated reference documents:
- google-landscape-2026.md: SISTRIX analysis, QRG updates, AI content prevalence, AMP deprecation
- geo-optimization.md: Cross-platform citation data, platform-specific patterns, crawler growth
- content-rules.md: Title optimization, TL;DR box, readability targets, information gain
- visual-media.md: AVIF format, <picture> element, LCP rules, dark mode support
- quality-scoring.md: Restructured to 5-category 100-point system

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Phase 2: Add 6 new sub-skills (outline, seo-check, schema, repurpose, geo, audit)

- blog-outline: SERP-informed outline generation with content gap analysis
- blog-seo-check: Post-writing SEO validation with pass/fail checklist
- blog-schema: JSON-LD schema generation (BlogPosting, Person, Organization, FAQ)
- blog-repurpose: Cross-platform content repurposing (social, email, YouTube, Reddit)
- blog-geo: AI citation optimization audit with 0-100 readiness score
- blog-audit: Full-site blog health assessment with parallel subagent delegation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Phase 1: Fix phantom update, add repo infrastructure

- Replace all "January 2026 Authenticity Update" references with verified
  December 2025 Core Update (Dec 11-29, 2025)
- Rename seo-2026.md to google-landscape-2026.md
- Add install.ps1 (Windows), uninstall.sh, requirements.txt
- Add CHANGELOG.md, TODO.md, screenshots/README.md
- Create docs/: INSTALLATION, COMMANDS, ARCHITECTURE, TEMPLATES,
  TROUBLESHOOTING, MCP-INTEGRATION
- Update install.sh for 12 sub-skills, 4 agents, templates, pip install

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Initial commit: Claude Code blog skill ecosystem

Full-lifecycle blog management skill for Claude Code with 6 sub-skills
(write, rewrite, analyze, brief, calendar, strategy), 2 specialized agents,
5 reference docs, and a Python quality analysis script. Dual-optimized for
Google rankings (Authenticity Update, E-E-A-T) and AI citations (GEO/AEO).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

releases.name: v1.3.1 — Spec Compliance & Windows Fix
releases.body:
### Fixed
- **install.ps1**: Updated paths for `skills/blog/` restructure (Windows installer was broken since v1.3.0)
- **install.ps1**: Added `blog` skip in sub-skill loop to prevent double-copy

### Added
- **SKILL.md**: `license`, `compatibility`, and `metadata` fields per Agent Skills spec (agentskills.io)
- **plugin.json**: `version`, `homepage`, `license` fields
- GitHub issue template and PR template (community health)

### Audit Results
Full audit against Agent Skills spec, anthropics/skills, anthropics/claude-plugins-official, and skill-creator best practices — **all 14 hard requirements pass**.

releases.name: v1.3.0 — Plugin Standard, Tests, CI & DataForSEO
releases.body:
Major infrastructure update aligning with official Anthropic plugin/skill standards.

### Added
- `.claude-plugin/plugin.json` for `/plugin install` ecosystem
- 44 pytest unit tests for `analyze_blog.py`
- GitHub Actions CI (Python tests, SKILL.md validation, plugin.json validation)
- **DataForSEO MCP integration** docs — recommended primary MCP server
- `pyproject.toml`, `CONTRIBUTING.md`, `.mcp.json`
- Skill evaluation scenarios (7 trigger test cases)

### Changed
- Directory restructure: `blog/` → `skills/blog/` (official plugin layout)
- README: plugin install as primary method
- MCP-INTEGRATION.md: DataForSEO as recommended integration

### Fixed
- install.sh: TEMP_DIR global scope, removed `--break-system-packages`, cleanup
- CI: lint-markdown grep false positive
- Docs: 11 double `skills/skills/` path instances

releases.name: v1.2.1 — Install Fix
releases.body:
### Fixed
- install.sh: TEMP_DIR moved to global scope so EXIT trap works with `set -u` when installing via `curl | bash`

Thanks to [@twdnhfr](https://github.com/twdnhfr) for the fix!

releases.name: v1.2.0 — Readability Upgrade
releases.body:
Research-backed readability upgrade (120+ sources).

### Changed
- Flesch target: 45-60 → 60-70 (Yoast/GEO/WCAG aligned)
- New automated checks: passive voice, transition words, AI trigger words, sentence length
- New reference sections for readability signals
- 16 files updated

### Added
- YouTube demo video, header image, demo GIFs

releases.name: v1.1.0 — Built-in SVG Charts
releases.body:
### Added
- Built-in SVG chart generation (blog-chart sub-skill) — 7 chart types
- Image URL verification in researcher agent
- Mid-writing readability check in writer agent
- Image density guidelines

### Changed
- claude-blog is now fully self-contained — no external skill dependencies

readme_html:
claude-blog

The most comprehensive blog creation skill for Claude Code.

Strategy, briefs, calendars, writing, optimization, schema, repurposing, and full-site audits — all from slash commands. Dual-optimized for Google rankings and AI citation platforms (ChatGPT, Perplexity, AI Overviews).

Watch the Demo

Quick Start

Plugin install (recommended):

/plugin install claude-blog@AgriciDaniel

Or one-command install (Unix/macOS):

curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/AgriciDaniel/claude-blog/main/install.sh | bash

Or clone and install manually:

git clone https://github.com/AgriciDaniel/claude-blog.git
cd claude-blog
chmod +x install.sh && ./install.sh

Windows (PowerShell):

.\install.ps1

Restart Claude Code after installation to activate.

Commands

Command Description
/blog write <topic> Write a new blog post from scratch
/blog rewrite <file> Optimize an existing blog post
/blog analyze <file> Quality audit with 0-100 score
/blog brief <topic> Generate a detailed content brief
/blog calendar Generate an editorial calendar
/blog strategy <niche> Blog strategy and topic ideation
/blog outline <topic> SERP-informed content outline
/blog seo-check <file> Post-writing SEO validation
/blog schema <file> Generate JSON-LD schema markup
/blog repurpose <file> Repurpose for social, email, YouTube
/blog geo <file> AI citation readiness audit
/blog audit [directory] Full-site blog health assessment

Features

12 Content Templates

Auto-selected based on topic and intent: how-to guide, listicle, case study, comparison, pillar page, product review, thought leadership, roundup, tutorial, news analysis, data research, FAQ knowledge base.

5-Category Quality Scoring (100 Points)

Category Points Focus
Content Quality 30 Depth, readability, originality, engagement
SEO Optimization 25 Headings, title, keywords, links, meta
E-E-A-T Signals 15 Author, citations, trust, experience
Technical Elements 15 Schema, images, speed, mobile, OG tags
AI Citation Readiness 15 Citability, Q&A format, entity clarity

Scoring bands: Exceptional (90-100), Strong (80-89), Acceptable (70-79), Below Standard (60-69), Rewrite (<60).

AI Content Detection

Burstiness scoring, known AI phrase detection (17 phrases), vocabulary diversity analysis (TTR). Flags content that reads as AI-generated.

Dual Optimization

Every article targets both Google rankings and AI citation platforms:

  • Google: December 2025 Core Update compliance, E-E-A-T, schema markup, internal linking
  • AI Citations: Answer-first formatting (+340% citations), citation capsules, passage-level citability, FAQ schema (+28% citations)

Visual Media

  • Pixabay/Unsplash/Pexels image sourcing with alt text
  • Built-in SVG chart generation (bar, grouped bar, lollipop, donut, line, area, radar)
  • Image density targets by content type
  • Image URL verification (HTTP 200 check before embedding)

Platform Support

Next.js/MDX, Astro, Hugo, Jekyll, WordPress, Ghost, 11ty, Gatsby, and static HTML.

Architecture

claude-blog/
├── .claude-plugin/
│   └── plugin.json                     # Plugin metadata (name, description, author)
├── skills/
│   ├── blog/                           # Main orchestrator
│   │   ├── SKILL.md                    # Routes all 12 commands
│   │   ├── references/                 # 12 on-demand reference docs
│   │   └── templates/                  # 12 content type templates
│   ├── blog-write/SKILL.md            # Sub-skills (12 user-facing + 1 internal)
│   ├── blog-rewrite/SKILL.md
│   ├── blog-analyze/SKILL.md
│   ├── blog-brief/SKILL.md
│   ├── blog-calendar/SKILL.md
│   ├── blog-strategy/SKILL.md
│   ├── blog-outline/SKILL.md
│   ├── blog-seo-check/SKILL.md
│   ├── blog-schema/SKILL.md
│   ├── blog-repurpose/SKILL.md
│   ├── blog-geo/SKILL.md
│   ├── blog-audit/SKILL.md
│   └── blog-chart/SKILL.md            # Internal: SVG chart generation
├── agents/                             # 4 specialized agents
│   ├── blog-researcher.md
│   ├── blog-writer.md
│   ├── blog-seo.md
│   └── blog-reviewer.md
├── scripts/
│   └── analyze_blog.py                 # Python quality analysis (5-category scoring)
├── tests/                              # pytest test suite
│   ├── conftest.py
│   └── test_analyze_blog.py
├── docs/                               # 6 documentation files
├── .github/workflows/ci.yml           # CI pipeline
├── install.sh                          # Unix/macOS installer (fallback)
├── install.ps1                         # Windows PowerShell installer
├── pyproject.toml                      # Python project config
├── requirements.txt                    # Python dependencies
├── CONTRIBUTING.md
├── CHANGELOG.md
├── LICENSE
└── README.md

Requirements

  • Claude Code CLI installed and configured
  • Python 3.12+ (for analyze_blog.py quality scoring script)
  • Optional: pip install -r requirements.txt for advanced analysis (readability scoring, schema detection)

Uninstall

Unix/macOS:

chmod +x uninstall.sh && ./uninstall.sh

Windows (PowerShell):

.\uninstall.ps1

Integration

Chart generation is built-in — no external dependencies required for full functionality.

Optional companion skills (for deeper analysis of published pages):

Skill Integration
/seo Deep SEO analysis of published blog pages
/seo-schema Schema markup validation and generation
/seo-geo AI citation optimization audit

Documentation

Detailed documentation is available in docs/:

  • Installation Guide -- Unix, macOS, Windows, manual install
  • Command Reference -- Full 12-command reference with examples
  • Architecture -- System design and component overview
  • Templates -- Template reference and customization
  • Troubleshooting -- Common issues and fixes
  • MCP Integration -- Optional MCP server setup

Contributing

Contributions welcome! See CONTRIBUTING.md for guidelines.

License

MIT License. See LICENSE for details.

Built by AgriciDaniel with Claude Code.
